# GOES-15 SEP proton differential energy spectrum (reconstructed)
#
# Quantity : differential proton flux
# Units    : cm^-2 s^-1 sr^-1 MeV^-1
#   (flux per unit energy interval, per unit solid angle,
#    per unit area, per unit time — standard SEP convention)
#
# Instrument : GOES-15 EPEAD (and HEPAD where available)
# Channels   : EPEAD P1-P7 uncorrected proton flux
#              (P1E/P1W: 0.74-4.2 MeV,  P2: 4.2-8.7 MeV,
#               P3: 8.7-14.5 MeV,       P4: 15-40 MeV,
#               P5: 38-82 MeV,          P6: 84-200 MeV,
#               P7: 110-900 MeV)
#
# Reconstruction method
#   Each native GOES channel is assigned an effective energy equal
#   to the geometric mean of its nominal energy-bin bounds.
#   At each output time step the observed channel fluxes (those
#   that are finite and positive) are converted to log10(E) and
#   log10(flux), then interpolated piecewise-linearly across the
#   requested energy grid.  This is equivalent to assuming a local
#   power-law spectrum between neighbouring channel centres.
#   Minimum valid channels required : 3
#
# Outside-range extrapolation : powerlaw
#   Values outside the observed channel range are extrapolated
#   using the log-log slope defined by the two outermost valid
#   channel centres (power-law extension on each side).
#
# NaN convention
#   A flux value of 'nan' at a given (time, energy) means one of:
#     1. Fewer than min_valid_channels native channels had finite,
#        positive flux at that time step (spectrum not reconstructed).
#     2. The energy falls outside the observed channel range and
#        outside_mode='none' was selected.
#   NaN does NOT indicate zero flux; it indicates missing or
#   unsupported data.  Do not replace NaN with zero.
#
# Time convention : UTC, format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ (ISO 8601)
#
# Energy grid (MeV, logarithmically spaced, one value per data column):
# Energy_MeV: 4 4.46749 4.98962 5.57277 6.22408 6.9515 7.76394 8.67134 9.68478 10.8167 12.0808 13.4928 15.0697 16.8309 18.798 20.995 23.4487 26.1893 29.2501 32.6686 36.4867 40.751 45.5137 50.833 56.774 63.4093 70.8201 79.0971 88.3414 98.6661 110.197 123.077 137.461 153.526 171.469 191.51 213.892 238.89 266.81 297.992 332.82 371.717 415.161 463.682 517.874 578.399 645.998 721.498 805.821 900
# n_energy_bins : 50
# emin_MeV      : 4
# emax_MeV      : 900
#
# Columns: timestamp[UTC] flux_E1[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E2[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E3[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E4[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E5[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E6[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E7[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E8[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E9[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E10[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E11[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E12[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E13[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E14[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E15[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E16[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E17[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E18[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E19[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E20[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E21[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E22[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E23[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E24[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E25[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E26[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E27[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E28[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E29[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E30[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E31[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E32[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E33[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E34[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E35[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E36[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E37[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E38[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E39[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E40[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E41[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E42[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E43[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E44[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E45[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E46[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E47[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E48[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E49[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1] flux_E50[cm^-2.s^-1.sr^-1.MeV^-1]
# Column 1        : UTC timestamp
# Columns 2-51   : differential flux at each energy bin
#
